source: Android PpiDataTest; iOS raw parser uses out-of-range Data.subdata for this malformed payload

expected.sharedOwnership: Protocol-only characterization excluded from current shared parser ownership boundary because current Android/iOS behavior is platform-specific. Use this vector to make an explicit shared parser policy before promoting this behavior to common code.

notes: Android currently throws for a short raw type-0 PPI sample when the final flags byte is missing. iOS is excluded because the current parser can terminate on out-of-range Data.subdata instead of throwing a catchable parser error.
